name: Student Information System (PowerSchool)
notes: Student records grades attendance. 2400 student records.

name: Learning Management System (Canvas)
notes: Course materials assignments. Teachers and students depend on this daily.

name: Google Workspace for Education
notes: Email drive docs for all staff and students. 2500 accounts.

name: Active Directory / Authentication
notes: All logins depend on this. Single sign-on for SIS LMS and email.

name: Core Network Switch
notes: All network traffic routes through this. Failure = total network outage.

name: WiFi Controller (Aruba)
notes: Manages all classroom and office WiFi access points.

name: Security Camera System (Verkada)
notes: 32 cameras covering entrances hallways parking lot. 30-day retention.

name: PA / Intercom System
notes: Building-wide announcements and emergency alerts. Analog system with digital trigger.

name: Lunch Payment System (PaySchools)
notes: Student lunch payments and tracking. PCI-DSS scope.

name: Internet Gateway / Firewall (Fortinet)
notes: Single internet connection. All cloud services depend on this.

name: SchoolMessenger (Parent Communication)
notes: Emergency notifications to parents. SMS email and app push.

name: Backup Server (Synology NAS)
notes: Nightly backups of SIS and file shares. 14-day retention.
